channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Matthew Seidler denies allegations of wrongdoing from wife of late Padres owner Peter
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — One of the brothers sued by the wife of late San Diego Padres owner Peter Seidler for control of the team says her allegations of wrongdoing are untrue.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UCLA's Mick Cronin calls his players 'soft' and 'delusional' after losing for 3rd time in 4 games
item.description: UCLA coach Mick Cronin ripped into his players following the 22nd-ranked Bruins’ third loss in four games, saying they don’t give enough effort and lack toughness.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Emeka Eneli, Diego Luna called to USMNT Camp after breakout seasons
item.description: Real Salt Lake midfielder Emeka Eneli and Diego Luna's stellar 2024 MLS campaigns have been rewarded with call-ups to the U.S. Men's National Team's January training camp, making a pivotal moment in their burgeoning careers.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Former Baltimore Orioles left-hander Brian Matusz dies at 37, no cause of death announced
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Brian Matusz, the left-handed pitcher who spent eight seasons in the major leagues, mostly with the Baltimore Orioles as they returned to prominence a decade ago, has died. He was 37.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sen. Tuberville: Senate to consider my bill, the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act
item.description: Sen. Tommy Tuberville, R-Ala., warned in an op-ed for OutKick that Title IX may cease to exist unless the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act passes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Masters gives another invitation to Niemann. Hojgaard invitation means Augusta gets twins
item.description: Joaquin Niemann of LIV Golf is returning to the Masters, the second straight time Augusta National has given the Chilean a special invitation.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: All-Bay Area News Group high school football 2024: Running backs
item.description: St. Francis, California, St. Ignatius, De La Salle, Monte Vista, Liberty players among those recognized.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Heisman Trophy runner-up Ashton Jeanty of Boise State to enter NFL draft
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Ashton Jeanty, who rushed for the second-most yards in a season in major-college football history and was runner-up for the Heisman Trophy, will leave Boise State to enter the NFL draft.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Belgian Grand Prix gets contract extension but set to be dropped from F1 schedule in 2028 and 2030
item.description: Formula 1 has extended its contract with the Belgian Grand Prix, but one of the sport's most established races is set to be dropped from the schedule in 2028 and 2030. The extension starting from next year includes races only in 2026, 2027, 2029 and 2031, F1 said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: High school boys soccer rankings, Jan. 8, 2025: Bay Area News Group Top 10
item.description: Bay Area boys soccer: Archbishop Mitty, Mountain View, De La Salle, Bellarmine lead first prep rankings of 2025
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Australian Open 2025: There really isn't much time off in the offseason for tennis players
item.description: If it seems as though the 2025 professional tennis year started pretty much immediately right after 2024 ended, that’s because that’s exactly what happens in a sport where the offseason really does not leave players much time to be “off.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Final chapter: France's greatest coach Didier Deschamps says he'll leave after 2026 World Cup
item.description: Didier Deschamps announced Wednesday that he won’t continue as France coach after the next World Cup, bringing an end to an era in which he became the nation's most successful manager over more than a decade.
item.dc:creator: SAMUEL PETREQUIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Daniels and Nix will become a rare rookie QB duo to start in the same postseason
item.description: Inside the Numbers dives into NFL statistics, streaks and trends each week. For more Inside the Numbers, head here. ___ The impressive feats from the 2024 rookie quarterback class will carry over into the postseason.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: West Virginia's Javon Small leads the Big 12 in scoring to fuel West Virginia's return to the Top 25
item.description: Javon Small was the best player on mediocre teams during his first three college seasons. Now he’s the Big 12’s leading scorer and a major reason why short-handed West Virginia is relevant again. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN RABY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: BYU's 14-game home winning streak ends, 72-67
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team has hit a rough patch at the start of Big 12 Conference play. The Cougars made just 5 of 23 three-point attempts in a 72-67 loss at home to Texas Tech Tuesday night. That ended a 14-game winning streak for BYU at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Trae Young's 49-foot buzzer-beater lifts Hawks to a 124-121 win over the Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Trae Young hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer from beyond the halfcourt line to give the Atlanta Hawks a 124-121 victory over the Utah Jazz on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN COON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Brayden Point scores with 52 seconds to play to lift Lightning to 3-2 win over Hurricanes
item.description: Brayden Point scored with 52 seconds to play and the Tampa Bay Lightning snapped a four-game skid with a 3-2 victory over the Carolina Hurricanes on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utes drop fourth straight to #3 Iowa State, 82-59
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes gave #3 Iowa State a game, but the Cyclones overpowered the Utes down the stretch for an 82-59 victory, handing the Utes their fourth straight defeat. Curtis Jones had 23 points off the bench to lead Iowa State to its 10th straight win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giants agree to deal with Justin Verlander: reports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants are adding former MVP Justin Verlander to their pitching staff, multiple outlets reported Tuesday. The team reportedly agreed to a one-year deal with the pitcher. Verlander, 41, is one of the best pitchers of the 2000s and a future Hall of Famer.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Vikings' Flores will take all requested interviews, but says head coach vacancy has to be right fit
item.description: EAGAN, Minn. (AP) — Brian Flores paused during a reflection on his path through the NFL, unabashed by his goal of getting another head coaching job, to make clear how much he has appreciated his experience as defensive coordinator of the Minnesota Vikings.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gaudreau suspect pleads not guilty to homicide charges after turning down 35-year prison sentence
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The driver charged with killing NHL hockey player Johnny Gaudreau and his brother, Matthew, as they cycled on a rural New Jersey road pleaded not guilty to the indictment Tuesday after turning down a prosecution offer of 35 years in prison. Sean M.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coby White stars as Bulls rally past Spurs for 114-110 victory
item.description: Coby White made a go-ahead layup with 47 seconds left, and the Chicago Bulls topped Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs 114-110 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Zac Blair tries to regain PGA Tour status
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The first full field event of the season on the PGA Tour, the Hawaiian Open, tees off on Thursday. Former BYU star Zac Blair flew out to Hawaii to try to Monday qualify because he no longer has full status on the tour.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs with Bowles celebrates another division title with dose of caution for playoff rematch
item.description: For the fifth consecutive season, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers will enter the NFL postseason, their fourth straight time as champions of the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report: Bears seek permission to interview Cowboys' Mike McCarthy for head coaching vacancy
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears have sought permission to interview Dallas Cowboys head coach Mike McCarthy and are awaiting a response from the Cowboys, according to ESPN's Adam Schefter.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Broncos clinch playoffs after 38-0 win over Chiefs
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — They say, "It ain't how you start; it's how you finish." For the Denver Broncos, their season finale had it all—high stakes, playoff hopes, and a shot at redemption against a Kansas City Chiefs team resting most of its stars.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Lions secure NFC's No. 1 seed, Broncos and Buccaneers clinch the NFL's final two playoff spots
item.description: The road to the Super Bowl in the NFC will go through Motown. The Detroit Lions secured a No. 1 seed with a 31-9 victory over the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Colts owner Jim Irsay says he's retaining GM Chris Ballard and coach Shane Steichen
item.description: About four hours after the Colts completed their season with a 26-23 overtime victory over the Jacksonville Jaguars, Irsay ended any speculation about possible offseason changes by announcing in a letter to fans that longtime general manager Chris Ballard and second-year coach Shane Steichen would r
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Patriots fire coach Jerod Mayo shortly after beating Bills to finish his lone season at 4-13
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The New England Patriots fired coach Jerod Mayo on Sunday after one season, beginning another reboot for the franchise just a year after it parted with longtime coach Bill Belichick.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: New Orleans Saints, NFL to donate $1 million to victims of truck attack
item.description: The relief contributions come after Shamsud-Din Jabbar drove a rented truck into a crowd on New Year’s Day on Bourbon Street, killing 14 people.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego Wave FC announces termination of contract for midfielder Emily van Egmond
item.description: San Diego Wave FC announced Friday that midfielder Emily van Egmond and the club have mutually agreed to terminate her contract.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Utah State holds off Fresno State to improve to 14-1
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State is proving to be the team to beat in the Mountain West Conference this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White nails career-high nine 3s, scores 33 as Bulls beat Knicks 139-126 after honoring Rose
item.description: Coby White made a career-high nine 3-pointers and scored 33 points, Zach LaVine also had 33 and the Chicago Bulls beat the New York Knicks 139-126 after honoring former MVP Derrick Rose on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James breaks Michael Jordan's record for 30-point games with his 563rd
item.description: LeBron James broke Michael Jordan's NBA record for 30-point games during the Los Angeles Lakers' victory over Atlanta on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Naval Base San Diego basketball introduces two teams
item.description: The Naval Base San Diego basketball team is led by LaQuan Hansley, the former Triton player-turned-head coach, who revived the program after it was shut down during the COVID-19 pandemic.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Red Rocks begins 50th season with big dreams
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After finishing third in the NCAA Nationals last season, the Utah gymnastics team has reloaded and is ready to make a run at its first national title in 30 years. The Red Rocks begin its 50th season Friday at home against Utah State loaded with talent.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: UIC men's basketball team scores huge win by knocking mid-major power Drake from ranks of unbeaten
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Drake men's basketball team walked into Credit Union 1 Arena on Chicago's Near West Side on New Year's Day with no losses this season. They exited with one, courtesy of the University of Illinois Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
